nodes.name: 2026-06-12-dashboard-gui-W01-P01-S01
nodes.title: replace per-frame edge re-tessellation with mesh-based edge rendering in the spike harness per the G6.b spike finding

nodes.name: 2026-06-12-dashboard-gui-W01-P01-S02
nodes.title: run the integrated-GPU frame-time gate at 1k/5k and 10k/50k synthetic corpora and record results against the G6.b gate criteria

nodes.name: 2026-06-12-vaultspec-engine-W01-P01-S01
nodes.title: Define Node, NodeKind, Edge, RelationKind, Tier, Provenance and ScopeRef types per ADR section 3 as pure no-IO types

nodes.name: 2026-06-12-vaultspec-engine-W01-P01-S02
nodes.title: Implement stable NodeId derivation from kind plus canonical key (feature tag, vault stem, plan stem plus step id, commit sha, repo path plus symbol) with unit tests

nodes.name: 2026-06-12-vaultspec-engine-W01-P01-S03
nodes.title: Implement stable EdgeId content-hash derivation over src, dst, relation, tier and provenance key with determinism unit tests

nodes.name: 2026-06-12-vaultspec-engine-W01-P01-S04
nodes.title: Implement the SQLite schema for derived artifacts keyed by input content hash, the temporal event log, and the semantic TTL cache

nodes.name: 2026-06-12-vaultspec-engine-W01-P01-S05
nodes.title: Implement the store read and write API with single-writer discipline and concurrent-reader tests

nodes.name: 2026-06-12-vaultspec-engine-W01-P02-S06
nodes.title: Implement workspace discovery resolving any launch directory to the repository common git dir via gix, with fixture-repo tests

nodes.name: 2026-06-12-vaultspec-engine-W01-P02-S07
nodes.title: Implement worktree enumeration capturing checkout path, HEAD ref and dirty state

nodes.name: 2026-06-12-vaultspec-engine-W01-P02-S08
nodes.title: Implement local-branch enumeration with advisory default, feature and other classification and a lazy cached corpus-diff confirmation hook

nodes.name: 2026-06-12-vaultspec-engine-W01-P02-S09
nodes.title: Implement remote-ref mapping flagged with degraded tiers (declared and temporal only, no working tree)

nodes.name: 2026-06-12-vaultspec-engine-W01-P02-S10
nodes.title: Implement the commit-log walk producing temporal event records with timestamp, kind, ref and touched paths
